title: Department Manager Vacancy at Future Retail - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Future Retail - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Future Retail! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Vadodara team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Future Retail:
Future Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Future Retail!
